author: MaryPettisArt
text: All of my life I have been contemplating the growth and nature and inner life of trees, and the more I study them, the deeper their mystery becomes! The mother tree in this group along the bluffs of Lake Tahoe seemed to look gently back at me and say “I see you, too!” -M https://t.co/d3DsA5JKWR

author: katumade_yamen
text:
月曜お疲れ様でした‼️

週の始まりをちゃんと積めた人、 それだけで勝ち。

月曜に動けた人は 火曜も水曜も動ける。

逆に月曜サボると ズルズル1週間終わる。

今日動いた自分を褒めて 明日もまた一緒に積もう🐜🔥

author: moraimessenger
displayName: Morai the Messenger 🦉 - AHSOKA S2 Updates
text:
THROWBACK 🦉 10 YEARS ago...in a galaxy far, far away...Ahsoka Tano died? Alas, she did not. And the same convor owl, Morai, who greeted her at her "death" now greets her in life on Peridea...what do we think the journey looks like for these two connected beings of the Force? 

I truly can't believe it's been 10 freaking years since the end of STAR WARS: REBELS season 2...I'm old as hell. 

#AhsokaLives
